description: Visualizes scalar measurements within a known range using the native HTML meter element.
do: Use value with min and max
Use low and high for thresholds
Use optimum for ideal value ranges
dont: Do not use variant or intent props

examples.label: Storage usage
examples.emmet: meter[value=68 min=0 max=100 low=30 high=70 optimum=100]
examples.html: <meter value="68" min="0" max="100" low="30" high="70" optimum="100"></meter>

examples.label: Low state
examples.emmet: meter[value=20 min=0 max=100 low=30 high=70 optimum=100]
examples.html: <meter value="20" min="0" max="100" low="30" high="70" optimum="100"></meter>

examples.label: Medium state
examples.emmet: meter[value=50 min=0 max=100 low=30 high=70 optimum=100]
examples.html: <meter value="50" min="0" max="100" low="30" high="70" optimum="100"></meter>

examples.label: Optimal state
examples.emmet: meter[value=90 min=0 max=100 low=30 high=70 optimum=100]
examples.html: <meter value="90" min="0" max="100" low="30" high="70" optimum="100"></meter>
